## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance / tooling / dependencies
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up-to-date with `main`
- [ ] I followed the [commit convention](CONTRIBUTING.md#branching--commit-convention)
- [ ] I tested this on a real VPS / VM (not just locally)
- [ ] I updated docs if my change adds a new feature or step
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, domains, or usernames
